source_intake_record.raw_question_text:
Consider a combination of T and D flip-flops connected as shown in <image>. The output of the D flip-flop is connected to the input of the T flip-flop, and the output of the T flip-flop is connected to the input of the D flip-flop.

Initially, both \( Q_0 \) and \( Q_1 \) are set to 1 (before the 1st clock cycle). The outputs
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: \( Q_1Q_0 \) after the 3rd cycle are 11 and after the 4th cycle are 01, respectively

choice_map.C: \( Q_1Q_0 \) after the 3rd cycle are 00 and after the 4th cycle are 11, respectively
choice_map.D: \( Q_1Q_0 \) after the 3rd cycle are 01 and after the 4th cycle are 01, respectively
